name: Bottomline Technologies B2B Payments REST API
what_it_does: Bottomline Technologies B2B payments and financial messaging REST API for banks, financial institutions, and corporate treasury teams to process business payments, manage SWIFT/ACH/wire transfers, automate accounts payable workflows, access payment fraud detection, and handle financial document management — enabling automated B2B payment orchestration, multi-bank connectivity, payment fraud prevention, and financial supply chain financing through Bottomline's B2B payments and financial technology platform. Enables AI agents to manage payment submission for ACH, wire, and SWIFT payment processing automation, handle payment status for transaction tracking and reconciliation automation, access bank connectivity for multi-bank payment routing automation, retrieve fraud detection for payment anomaly and fraud alert automation, manage AP automation for invoice and payment approval workflow automation, handle digital banking for commercial bank portal integration automation, access SWIFT messaging for bank-to-bank financial message automation, retrieve payment analytics for cash flow and payment reporting automation, manage supply chain finance for early payment and dynamic discounting automation, and integrate Bottomline with ERP, TMS, and banking systems for enterprise B2B payment automation.
use_cases: Automating high-value B2B wire and ACH payment processing for corporate treasury automation agents
Managing multi-bank payment connectivity and routing for financial operations automation agents
Detecting and preventing B2B payment fraud in real-time for financial risk automation agents
Processing SWIFT financial messages for bank-to-bank settlement automation agents
not_for: Consumer payments (Bottomline is B2B/corporate payments, not consumer payment gateway)
E-commerce checkout (Bottomline is enterprise treasury and bank payments, not Stripe for websites)
Cryptocurrency payments (Bottomline is traditional financial messaging and bank transfers)
best_when: A corporate treasury team, bank, or financial institution wanting AI agents to automate B2B payment processing, SWIFT messaging, AP payment workflows, and payment fraud detection through Bottomline's enterprise B2B payments and financial technology platform.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL INSTITUTION RELATIONSHIP REQUIRED: Bottomline serves banks and corporate treasuries; automated consumer access assumption creates institutional_required; automated must be bank or corporate treasury with Bottomline agreement. SWIFT CONNECTIVITY IS LICENSED: SWIFT messaging requires SWIFT BIC code and connectivity license; automated open SWIFT assumption creates swift_not_connected without SWIFT membership; automated must have SWIFT connectivity configured. PAYMENT RULES ARE JURISDICTION-SPECIFIC: ACH, wire, and BACS payment rules vary by country; automated universal payment assumption creates regulatory_non-compliance for jurisdiction-specific payment formats; automated must implement correct payment format per destination country. FRAUD DETECTION REQUIRES TRAINING: Bottomline fraud models need historical payment data for baseline; automated instant-detection assumption creates high_false_positives without trained fraud models; automated must allow fraud model training period.

auth.notes: Bottomline uses OAuth2 + API key for B2B payments REST API. REST API with JSON. Portsmouth, NH HQ. Founded 1989. Acquired by Thoma Bravo PE in 2022 ($2.6B). Products: Paymode-X (B2B payments network), Digital Banking IQ, PT-X (payment fraud), Financial Messaging (SWIFT), Accounts Payable Automation. 500,000+ businesses, 800+ banks. SWIFT certified. Competes with Finastra, ACI Worldwide, and FIS for B2B banking and payments.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Demo for qualified enterprises; production requires Bottomline contract
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual contract by transaction volume and modules; bank and corporate pricing differ; enterprise custom pricing
pricing.notes: Portsmouth NH. Thoma Bravo PE. Annual contract. 800+ bank clients. B2B payments network.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; payment submission APIs throttled per contract tier

known_agent_gotchas: PAYMENT DEDUPLICATION IS CRITICAL: B2B payments require idempotency keys to prevent duplicate payments; automated retry-without-key assumption creates duplicate_payment; automated must implement payment deduplication with unique reference IDs

DUAL CONTROL APPROVAL: High-value payments often require dual control authorization; automated single-approver assumption creates payment_held_for_approval for dual-control configured payments; automated must implement two-person approval workflow

BANK ACCOUNT VALIDATION: Payment destinations must be validated before submission; automated unvalidated account assumption creates failed_payment for incorrect bank routing/account numbers; automated must pre-validate beneficiary accounts

CUTOFF TIMES ARE STRICT: ACH and wire payments have cutoff times for same-day processing; automated any-time submission assumption creates next_day_settlement for after-cutoff payments; automated must check bank cutoff times before payment submission

PAYMODE-X NETWORK VS DIRECT PAYMENT: Bottomline has two payment models (network enrollment vs direct bank); automated uniform API assumption creates routing_error for mixing network and direct payment flows; automated must distinguish Paymode-X network from direct payment APIs
agent_readiness.security_notes: B2B payments. PCI-DSS, SOC2, NACHA. OAuth2. US/UK. High-value corporate payment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: B2B banking. PCI-DSS, NACHA. OAuth2. US/UK. Corporate payment and bank account data.
